message:
feat(vercel): build Vercel deployment platform connector with 10 operations

Full V3 FcpConnector implementation for Vercel: projects, deployments,
domains, and environment variables. Bearer token auth, RetryLoop,
doctor diagnostics, typed introspection with AI hints. 57 tests passing.

Operations: projects.list/get, deployments.list/get/create/cancel,
domains.list/get, env.list/set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
 publish = false
-description = "FCP Vercel connector for Deployments, Projects, Domains, and Environment Variables"
+description = "FCP Vercel connector for deployments, projects, domains, and environment variables"
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "fcp-vercel"

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ schema_version = "2.1"
 id = "fcp.vercel"

+description = "Vercel connector for deployments, projects, domains, and environment variables"

-[provides.operations.deployments_list]
